title: olea humilis
intro: Olea humilis, also known as the dwarf olive tree, is a small tree or shrub native to South Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of oleuropein, a polyphenolic compound. The health benefits of Olea humilis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Olea humilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
